ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: 如果键盘响应迟缓，请尝试增加该数值
ast.target: 如果键盘响应迟缓，请尝试增加该数值

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If a file is already opened as a tab, it will not open in a new tab; instead, the existing tab will be activated. This option is enabled for three commands: 'open in new tab', 'open in new tab in background', and 'open all in new tabs'.
ast.target: 如果文件已经以标签页打开，则不会再在新标签页中打开；相反，会激活已有的标签页。此选项对以下三个命令启用：“在新标签页中打开”、“在后台新标签页中打开”和“在新标签页中打开全部”。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a keyword matches an alias, display the alias as the title.
ast.target: 当关键字匹配别名时，显示别名作为标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, it will no longer appear in the property display area of the search results.
ast.target: 启用后，它将不再出现在搜索结果的属性显示区域。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: It means your customized commands will be removed.
ast.target: 这意味着您的自定义命令将被移除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Adding this at the beginning of a query excludes matching results.
ast.target: 在查询开头添加此项可排除匹配的结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Transforms a selected link candidate into an internal link with an aliase based on a regex-defined rule when using the insert to editor command.
ast.target: 在使用插入到编辑器命令时，将选中的链接候选项根据正则定义的规则转换为内部链接并使用别名。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Defines the format for the alias after transformation, using regex-captured groups from the candidate name. Ex: $<name>
ast.target: 定义转换后别名的格式，使用来自候选名称的正则捕获组。例如：$<name>

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Click the button to enable/disable the search target
ast.target: 点击按钮以启用/禁用搜索目标。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set, folders whose paths start with one of the patterns will not be suggested. It can set multi patterns by line breaks
ast.target: 设置后，路径以任意模式开头的文件夹将不被建议。可通过换行设置多个模式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, automatically shows preview when selecting candidates.
ast.target: 启用后，选择候选项时会自动显示预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Delay before auto preview is triggered when selection changes.
ast.target: 在选择更改时触发自动预览前的延迟。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specifies the number of lines to display before and after the target line. For instance, setting this to '2' would display two lines before and two lines after the target line, providing context to the selected text
ast.target: 指定在目标行前后显示的行数。例如，将其设置为“2”将显示目标行前两行和后两行，为所选文本提供上下文。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum display character count before or after the matched word.
ast.target: 匹配词前后显示的最大字符数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A command that can execute ripgrep
ast.target: 可执行 ripgrep 的命令

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If set to 1 or more, the search will be executed automatically after the specified milliseconds have passed since entering a keyword. If set to 0, the search will only be executed when the hotkey is pressed.
ast.target: 如果设置为 1 或更大，搜索将在输入关键字后指定的毫秒数过去后自动执行。如果设置为 0，搜索仅在按下热键时执行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The minimum number of characters required to start an automatic search.
ast.target: 启动自动搜索所需的最少字符数。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default folder path for grep searches. Leave empty to use vault root. Use ./ for current directory.
ast.target: grep 搜索的默认文件夹路径。留空则使用库根目录。使用 ./ 表示当前目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, file names are also included in the search target.
ast.target: 启用后，文件名也会包含在搜索目标中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: How to sort folders in move dialog
ast.target: 移动对话框中文件夹的排序方式

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path within vault to store recently used folders history
ast.target: 在库中存储最近使用文件夹历史的路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Maximum number of recently used folders to remember
ast.target: 要记住的最近使用文件夹的最大数量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path within vault to store command history data
ast.target: 在库中存储命令历史数据的路径

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Commands not used within this number of days will be removed. Set to 0 to retain all history.
ast.target: 在此天数内未使用的命令将被删除。设置为 0 可保留所有历史记录。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: 将筛选词用作默认输入查询
ast.target: 将筛选词用作默认输入查询

ast.name: setName
ast.source: 在关键词匹配时将别名显示为标题
ast.target: 在关键词匹配时将别名显示为标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: 请使用 `Alt 1~9` 代替 `Ctrl/Cmd 1~9` 来快速选择结果
ast.target: 请使用 `Alt 1~9` 代替 `Ctrl/Cmd 1~9` 来快速选择结果

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Auto preview in the floating mode
ast.target: 在浮动模式下自动预览

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude prefix path patterns for "Backlink search"
ast.target: 排除“反向链接搜索”的前缀路径模式

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Max display length around matched word
ast.target: 匹配词周围的最大显示长度

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Minimum query length for auto search
ast.target: 自动搜索的最小查询长度

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Exclude prefix path patterns for "Move file to another folder"
ast.target: 为“将文件移动到其他文件夹”排除前缀路径模式

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最近使用的文件夹文件路径

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 最近使用的文件夹上限

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show log about performance in a console
ast.target: 在控制台显示性能日志

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Show fuzzy match score in the dialog
ast.target: 在对话框中显示模糊匹配分数

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Please set a key about "search" in the "Grep dialog" setting
ast.target: 请在“Grep 对话框”设置中为“search”设置一个键

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source: Type anything then shows the results
ast.target: 输入任意内容后显示结果

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.target: 如果已启用，显示快捷键指南

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Turn off the lock, if you want to reset all search commands
ast.target: 关闭锁定，以便重置所有搜索命令

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: Delete a command (!! it will never be restored !!)
ast.target: 删除命令（!! 将无法恢复 !!）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to load recently used folders:
ast.target: 加载最近使用的文件夹失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to save recently used folders:
ast.target: 未能保存最近使用的文件夹：

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: File explorer (core plugin) is not enabled.
ast.target: 文件资源管理器（核心插件）未启用。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Grep is not supported on mobile.

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 保险库路径已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy vault path to clipboard
ast.target: 未能将保险库路径复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Absolute file path copied to clipboard
ast.target: 绝对文件路径已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to copy absolute file path to clipboard
ast.target: 未能将绝对文件路径复制到剪贴板

ast.name: name
ast.target: 文件中的悬浮搜索标题

ast.name: name
ast.source: Reveal a folder in the file tree
ast.target: 在文件树中显示文件夹

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将文件移动到其他文件夹

ast.name: placeholder
ast.source: path from vault root (./ means current directory. ../ means parent directory)
ast.target: 相对于保险库根目录的路径（./ 表示当前目录，../ 表示上级目录）

ast.name: text
ast.source: For the space key, please set the value to 'Space'.
ast.target: 对于空格键，请将值设为 'Space'。

ast.name: text
ast.source: 'Ctrl a' means pressing the Ctrl key and the A key.
ast.target: “Ctrl a”表示按下 Ctrl 键和 A 键。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use 'Mod' instead of 'Ctrl' on Windows or 'Cmd' on macOS.
ast.target: 在 Windows 上使用 “Mod” 代替 “Ctrl”，在 macOS 上使用 “Cmd”。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 📁 将文件移动到其他文件夹
